commit.subject: LU-10391 lnet: change lnet_debug_peer() to struct lnet_nid
commit.message:
LU-10391 lnet: change lnet_debug_peer() to struct lnet_nid

lnet_debug_peer() now takes 'struct lnet_nid *'.
